final:
module RefModule (
    input wire D,
    input wire E,
    output reg Q
);
    always @(D or E) begin
        if (E) begin
            Q <= D; // Capture input when enabled
        end
        // Q holds its value when E is low
    end
  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
    end
  end

endmodule
